name: Notion
description: Notion is an all-in-one workspace for notes, docs, databases, and project management; its API allows creating and managing content and data across Notion workspaces.

auth_methods.note: Official docs state the Notion API uses OAuth 2.0 for third-party integrations and 'internal integration' bearer tokens (returned from My integrations) for workspace-scoped access; requests use an Authorization: Bearer TOKEN header.

credential_access.note: Official docs show developers can self-serve credentials by creating an integration from Notion settings and then copying the Internal Integration Token to authenticate API requests.

api_surface.note: Official API reference describes a HTTP REST API (GET, POST, PATCH, DELETE) covering pages, databases, blocks, users, search, and more; official client SDKs (JS, Python) are also provided that wrap the REST API.

buildability.note: Adjusted to match allowed enum values: verdict options are buildable_today/buildable_with_key_signup/blocked; user provided "buildable". Based on the provided note, this should be buildable_today (no approval required). Please confirm desired mapping.

queries: Create a Notion integration My integrations token
